title: No Less Gold, And Better Access: Tokenized Gold as a Practical Institutional Asset
message_html: No Less Gold, And Better Access: Tokenized Gold as a Practical Institutional Asset ...
snippet: Institutions want the protection of gold in a format that fits modern trading, treasury, and collate...

title: Allfunds to expand tokenised funds to Solana
message_html: Allfunds to expand tokenised funds to Solana ...
snippet: Allfunds Blockchain today announced it will be expanding its distribution and accessibility of tokenized funds to Solana, a high-performance network powering internet capital markets, payments, AI agents and crypto applications.

title: Ripple gains preliminary MiCA license ahead of July 1 EU deadline
message_html: Ripple gains preliminary MiCA license ahead of July 1 EU deadline ...
snippet: Ripple secures preliminary CASP approval in Luxembourg ahead of July 1 MiCA deadline as companies race for EU crypto licensing.
